name: Method Man
bio: Method Man (Clifford Smith Jr.) is an American rapper, songwriter, and actor, best known as a member of the Wu-Tang Clan. He is known for his distinctive voice and charismatic delivery. Method Man has also had a successful solo career and is one half of the duo Method Man & Redman.
facts: Won a Grammy Award for Best Rap Performance by a Duo or Group for 'I'll Be There for You/You're All I Need to Get By' with Mary J. Blige.
Has acted in films and TV shows, including 'How High' and 'Power Book II: Ghost'.
